hero.title: A personal site for artwork, writing, and whatever interesting thing comes next.
hero.lede: This homepage is designed to feel welcoming rather than salesy. It can introduce your dad, show selected work, share thoughts and updates, and leave room for a future shop if that becomes useful.
hero.panelText: Personal bio, portfolio, blog, events, and contact now. Marketplace later if it makes sense.

about.title: Introduce the person behind the work.
about.body: Use this section for a short biography, background, influences, and what kind of work or ideas visitors can expect to find here. Keep it conversational and grounded.

highlights.title: Personal story
highlights.text: Add a few sentences about your dad's background, interests, and what led him to create or share his work.

highlights.title: Creative range
highlights.text: Mention the kinds of artwork, experiments, writing, or projects he wants people to explore.

highlights.title: Local connection
highlights.text: Use this card for ties to the local community, exhibitions, events, collaborations, or places that matter to him.

portfolio.title: Selected work and featured ideas.
portfolio.intro: These cards are placeholders for real pieces, collections, or categories. They can become paintings, prints, sketches, essays, or any other body of work.

items.label: Featured piece
items.title: Work Title One
items.text: Short description, medium, year, or a note about why this piece matters.

items.label: Series
items.title: Collection or Theme
items.text: Use this to group related work or talk about an ongoing idea your dad keeps returning to.

items.label: Experiment
items.title: Something New
items.text: Reserve space for newer directions, playful work, or pieces that do not fit a strict category.

blog.title: Notes, reflections, and updates.
blog.intro: This can be used casually: studio thoughts, process notes, event recaps, ideas in progress, or stories from everyday life.

posts.title: First post placeholder
posts.text: Add a short entry here once the first real post is ready.

posts.title: Behind-the-scenes update
posts.text: Use this for progress notes, a new piece, or a thought worth sharing with visitors.

events.title: Local happenings and upcoming appearances.
events.intro: This section can highlight shows, markets, open studios, talks, or community appearances without turning the site into a hard sell.

items.name: Upcoming event placeholder
items.details: Add the event name, city, venue, and a short note once dates are confirmed.

items.name: Community appearance placeholder
items.details: Use this area for local participation, collaborations, or recurring appearances.

contact.title: Make it easy to reach out.
contact.body: Use the contact area for inquiries, local opportunities, commissions, or general conversation. If a shop is added later, this section can stay focused on direct connection.
contact.note: Future option: add a shop page or simple product list if there is interest in selling work directly.
